title: triplasis cornuta
intro: Triplasis cornuta, also known as Triplasis, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Triplasis cornuta include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Triplasis cornuta often involve making a tea by infusing the dried roots in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
